name: Crock Pot Chicken Curry for Two
directions: Cut chicken into small pieces and place in slow cooker.
Add all the remaining ingredients; cover and cook on high for 2 1/2 to 4 hours.

name: Simple Crock Pot Chicken Curry
directions: Put the chicken pieces into the crock pot.
Mix together the remaining ingredients and then toss with the chicken pieces in the crock pot.
Cover and cook on high 4-5 hours or 6-7 hrs on low.
Serve over rice.

similar.name: Crock Pot Chicken Curry for Two

name: Crock Pot Chicken Madras
directions: Place the sliced onions and apples on the bottom of the crock pot.
Sprinkle half the seasonings on top of the onions and apples.
Add the chicken pieces and finally sprinkle the remaining seasonings on top of the chicken.
Cook on low for 7-8 hours.

similar.name: Spicy Red Curry Chicken in Crockpot

name: Crock Pot Orange Curry Chicken
directions: PREPARATION:
In 3-4 quart crock pot, combine onion, peppers, chicken, garlic, orange juice, water, salt, and curry powder and mix well. Cover and cook on low for 6-7 hours until chicken is thoroughly cooked.
In small bowl, combine whipping cream and cornstarch and blend with wire whisk.
Stir into crock pot, turn heat to high, and cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring once, until sauce thickens. Serve over hot cooked rice with chutney, more curry powder, and cashews.

similar.name: Spicy Red Curry Chicken in Crockpot

name: Crock Pot Curried Chicken & Rice
directions: Combine curry, onion, ginger, oil and cayenne in a medium mixing bowl.
Stir in meat, working spice mixture into meat with fingers.
Place in Ziploc and refrigerate 1 – 24 hours.
Brown meat mixture and place in crock pot.
Add Rice and Broth to crock pot and mix well.
Cook on low 3-4 hours or until chicken is cooked through and all liquid is absorbed.

similar.name: Spicy Red Curry Chicken in Crockpot

name: Crock Pot Chicken Curry
directions: Place chicken, onion and potatoes in crock pot.
Mix orange juice, garlic, chicken bouillon, curry powder, salt and pepper and pour into crock pot.
Cover and cook on low 5-6 hours.
Remove chicken and vegetables and keep warm.
Dissolve cornstarch in water and stir into sauce in crock pot.
Cover and cook 20 min or until thickened.
Spoon chicken and vegetables over rice and top with sauce.

similar.name: Crock Pot Chicken Curry for Two

name: Crock Pot Golden Chicken Curry
directions: Place potatoes, carrot, chicken, and bell pepper in bottom of crock pot.
In a large saucepan on medium heat, sauté onion in olive oil and margarine until translucent.
Then stir in garlic paste, curry powder, turmeric, white pepper, ginger, cinnamon, and salt.
Next, gradually add flour mixing thoroughly into a pasty consistency.
Finally, slowly pour in chicken broth, thoroughly diluting the flour mixture. Make sure there are no lumps.
Last, pour broth mixture over the ingredients in the crockpot.
Cover and cook on high for 6 – 8 hours, stirring occasionally.
Serve over hot rice accompanied by sour and/or sweet pickled condiments.

similar.name: Spicy Red Curry Chicken in Crockpot

name: Easy Crock Pot Curry
directions: Fry onions in butter until soft then add to your crock pot.
Add all of the rest of the ingredients except peas and mushrooms.
Cook on low for several hours or high until the chicken is done.
Add the mushrooms and peas for the last 15 minutes of cook time.
Serve over rice.

name: Spicy Red Curry Chicken in Crockpot
directions: Mix first 5 ingredients in crockpot.
Remove stems from chili peppers and cut jalapeños in half and remove seeds.
Put peppers, garlic and ginger in food processor and chop up as finely as possible.
Add the mixture from the food processor to the crockpot.
Add the last 3 ingredients to the crockpot.
Mix.
Cook on high for 4 hours or on low for 8 hours.
Serve over rice.
